metadata.title: SYNGO_BP_499
metadata.comment:
Rationale: Fig. 5: HuD (ELAVL4) co-localises with Bdnf mRNA in hippocampal cultures transfected with recombinant GFP-mHuD at 14 DIV and stained using antisense probe against Bdnf. Furthermore knock-down of endogenous HuD in rat hippocampal cultures blocked the ability of PKC activation to increase dendritic translation of mRNAs with the long Bdnf 3' UTR.

28/5/2018 Pim
- Accepted in SynGO because BDNF is a synaptically active compound: "Brain-derived neurotrophic factor (BDNF) is an important molecule involved in learning and memory in the adult brain, with demonstrated roles in regulating synaptic plasticity [1-3]. ". Experimental description: Sprague Dawley rats, both male and females
